creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #7)
(...)

+SHEBANG_FILES= data/scripts/cairo-dock-package-theme.sh \
+               data/scripts/help_scripts.sh \
+               data/scripts/initial-setup.sh

-  @${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -type f -name "*.sh" | \
-          ${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/bin/bash|${LOCALBASE}/bin/bash|g'
